sections.content: Let me check the current position of the white shape after moving down.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current white shape position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N', 'R']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}] cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")

# Top bar progress
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nTop bar: '{ascii_lines[0][14:50]}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
